nasb.text: and say, ‘Thus says the Lord God, “Behold, I am against you, O Gog, prince of Rosh, Meshech and Tubal.

esv.text: and say, Thus says the Lord God: Behold, I am against you, O Gog, chief prince of Meshech and Tubal.

cnv.text: 說：‘主耶和華這樣說：羅施、米設和土巴的首領歌革啊，我要與你為敵。

ccb.text: 告诉他，主耶和华这样说，‘米设和土巴的首领歌革啊，我要与你为敌。
